name: vb6-to-csharp
description: End-to-end VB6 to C# migration toolkit for inventorying VB6 projects, planning a modern architecture, and translating forms, data access, and runtime patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Inventory and migrate VB6 apps to a modern C# stack.
interface.longDescription: A migration toolkit with commands, skills, and an architect agent for moving VB6 applications toward ASP.NET Core, EF Core, SQLite, Vite, React, and TypeScript.
defaultPrompt: Plan a VB6 to C# migration.
